summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of MASS INTERIORS marketing website. All major sections and functionality working correctly with only minor text spacing issue in hero title.

ui_bugs.issue: Hero title text spacing - shows 'ENGINEEREDINTERIORS.BUILT TO LAST.' instead of 'ENGINEERED INTERIORS. BUILT TO LAST.' (missing space after 'ENGINEERED')

passed_tests: Hero section loads with correct title (minor spacing issue)
Navigation bar shows all 5 required links (Solutions, Specifications, Portfolio, Resources, Contact)
Trust Metrics displays 4 metrics with counter animations
Solutions grid displays all 8 product cards with working hover effects
Tech Specs dashboard shows 6 technical data cards
Portfolio section displays 6 project case studies
Resources section shows 4 download cards (CAD, BIM, Datasheets, Guides)
Lead form contains all required fields: Full Name, Email, Phone, Company, Project Type, Area, Product Interest checkboxes, Message, Upload placeholder
All 6 product interest checkboxes are functional
Footer displays contact info (massinteriors.ind@gmail.com, Raipur, Chhattisgarh) and wordmark
Smooth scroll navigation works for all sections
Form submission logs to console as intended (mocked functionality)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor text spacing issue in hero title - add space between 'ENGINEERED' and 'INTERIORS' in the hero title text
